case_title: AMOURAFINA BURTON VS. SAN FRANCISCO SELF STORAGE III, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY BURTON, AMOURAFINA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SELF STORAGE III, LLC DBA SELF STORAGE I ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURTON, AMOURAFINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SELF STORAGE III, LLC DBA SELF STORAGE I STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
